query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%onboard%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%tour%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%onboard%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%tour%';
